title: ranunculastrum repens
intro: Ranunculastrum repens, also known as creeping buttercup, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ranunculastrum repens include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, promote wound healing, and act as a natural remedy for minor skin infections. Ranunculastrum repens can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
